description_long: This picnic table features a rectangular wooden tabletop with a natural wood grain finish, supported by four cylindrical metal legs positioned at each corner. The tabletop is flat and smooth, with no visible holes or cutouts, and the edges are straight and squared. The legs are metallic, likely made of steel or aluminum, and are evenly spaced to provide stability. There are no attached benches or seating elements visible, making this table suitable for use with separate chairs or benches. The overall design is minimalist and functional, with a focus on durability and ease of maintenance. The materials and construction suggest it is intended for outdoor or semi-outdoor urban environments.
description: A rectangular wooden picnic table with a smooth tabletop and four sturdy metal legs, designed for outdoor use. The table has a minimalist, functional appearance with no attached benches.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the wooden tabletop and all four metal legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow edge of the tabletop and two visible metal legs.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the tabletop and all four legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side, with the tabletop edge and two legs visible.
attribute_tabletop_support_structure: The tabletop is supported by four cylindrical metal legs, one at each corner, directly attached to the underside of the wooden surface. There are no visible crossbeams or additional bracing elements.
